description: Use this API to add a file to the specified group. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariofileadd(sgroup, sfile, stype, load, sargs)
python_syntax: ierr = scenariofileadd(sgroup, sfile, stype, load, sargs)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group to add a file to. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file to add. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: stype
parameters.description: File type identifier for the specified file. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: load
parameters.description: File’s position in the load order of its group. a load order of 0 specifies that the file is not loaded. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: sargs
parameters.description: Argument string to be used for the file when automatically opening the file. (input).
